summary: Completed comprehensive re-verification testing of FASE H6 (HR Analytics Dashboard / BI SDM) after environment restore. Backend APIs 100% functional with correct RBAC. Frontend dashboard renders all 6 KPI cards, charts, and period filter works correctly. Regression testing on H5 features and core modules confirms all previously-shipped functionality remains intact. One frontend navigation issue identified for manager role (backend access works, but nav item not visible).

ui_bugs.issue: Manager role cannot see 'BI SDM' nav item in ANALITIK (BI) group, despite having backend access (GET /hr/analytics/summary returns 200). Backend RBAC is correct (manager has hr.view permission), but frontend navigation filtering is incorrect.
ui_bugs.reproduction: Login as manager -> expand ANALITIK (BI) group -> BI SDM item not visible (but should be, as roles: ['admin', 'manager'] in navigationConfig.js line 319)
ui_bugs.workaround: Manager can access via direct URL navigation if needed, backend API works correctly

design_issues.issue: Default period shows 2026-08 (no data, 0% attendance) instead of 2026-06 (latest period with data). Period filter works correctly when manually changed.
design_issues.note: Same issue as iteration_88. Backend default period logic uses latest payroll period, but 2026-07 run exists which causes frontend to default to 2026-08. Not critical as period filter works.

passed_tests: Backend: Admin GET /hr/analytics/summary (200) - all keys present, data correct (headcount=6, attendance=100%, punctuality=56.2%, payroll gross=45.45M/net=42.59M, BPJS=6.26M, PPh21=1.14M)
Backend: Manager GET /hr/analytics/summary (200) - manager has hr.view permission
Backend: Sales GET /hr/analytics/summary (403) - correctly blocked
Backend: Period filter 2026-06 returns correct data (attendance 100%, punctuality 56.2%)
Backend: Period filter 2026-07 returns correct data (overtime 4.5 hours / 2 pengajuan)
Backend: Payroll_trend returns 6 months data (2026-01 to 2026-06)
Backend: Overtime_trend returns 6 months data with correct structure
Frontend US1: Admin login and navigation to BI SDM successful
Frontend US1: All 6 KPI cards render (kpi-headcount, kpi-attendance-rate, kpi-punctuality, kpi-payroll-net, kpi-bpjs, kpi-pph21)
Frontend US1: All charts render (4 recharts containers: Headcount per Departemen, Komposisi Tipe Pekerja, Distribusi Kehadiran, Tren Biaya Gaji, Tren Lembur)
Frontend US1: Statutory & Turnover panel renders with correct data
Frontend US1: No blocking 'SEGERA HADIR' overlay on dashboard content
Frontend US2: Period filter switches to 2026-06 successfully
Frontend US2: Data updates correctly when period changes (attendance 0% -> 100%, punctuality 0% -> 56.2%)
Frontend US2: Distribusi Kehadiran chart shows 18 records for 2026-06
Frontend US2: Tren Lembur shows correct message for 2026-06 (no overtime approved)
Frontend US5: Sales user does NOT see ANALITIK (BI) group (correct RBAC)
Frontend US5: Sales user cannot access BI SDM nav item (correct RBAC)
Regression: Control Tower dashboard loads without errors
Regression H5: KPI Design loads and displays data (6 KPI entries, auto-score computed)
Regression H5: Design Gallery loads and shows seeded motifs (Tenun Ikat Sumba, Batik Parang Klasik)
Regression CORE: HR Karyawan list loads (7 employees displayed)
Regression CORE: Slip Gaji list loads (12 payslips for periods 2026-06 and 2026-08)

success_percentage.backend: 100% (6/6 H6 tests passed, all RBAC correct)
success_percentage.frontend: 90% (US1, US2, US5 fully working; US3 has nav visibility issue but backend access works; US4 backend RBAC verified)

action_item_for_main_agent: Fix frontend navigation for manager role: BI SDM nav item (cs-bi-hrd) not visible in ANALITIK (BI) group for manager despite correct roles configuration in navigationConfig.js (line 319: roles: ['admin', 'manager']). Backend RBAC is correct (manager GET /hr/analytics/summary returns 200). Issue is in frontend navigation rendering/filtering logic. Check buildNavGroups() function or App.js navigation rendering for manager role.
